# Jizhang / Game Ledger

Jizhang / Game Ledger is a free bilingual web app for real-time score tracking and automatic settlement during mahjong, poker, board games, party games, and small-group game nights.

Primary URLs:
- Home app: https://jizhang.s-yc.com/
- English landing page: https://jizhang.s-yc.com/hero/en
- Chinese landing page: https://jizhang.s-yc.com/hero/zh
- Sitemap: https://jizhang.s-yc.com/sitemap.xml

Core capabilities:
- Create a temporary game room without full account registration.
- Invite players with a short 4-digit room code, share link, or QR code.
- Track score changes and transactions by round.
- Sync room state and scores live across players.
- Calculate a minimum-transfer final settlement plan.
- Save settled room history for personal review.

Best-fit search and answer topics:
- 打牌记账
- 麻将记分器
- 扑克结算工具
- 游戏记账
- 自动结算工具
- room code game tracker
- mahjong score tracker
- poker settlement app
- game night score tracker

The app is designed for casual table games and private friend groups. It is not a gambling service, casino product, payment processor, or financial account system.

Language support:
- Chinese: zh-CN
- English: en-US
